title: Hide Java Edition
description: Changing probably all in minecraft to "Minecraft" logo
body:
Most simpliest resource pack.

Removes the "Java Edition" signature under the "Minecraft" logo, adds the "Minecraft" logo to the pause menu and replaces the "Mojang Studios" logo with the "Minecraft" logo


**! Minecraft logo in Pause menu working only on specific languages, check it on this directory:** 
<details>
<summary>Directory</summary>

assets/minecraft/lang

</details>
